title: A request
wikitext:
[]: A request             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Wed Sep 19, 2007 10:00 pm This seems the best place to put this. Could someone create a copypasta of some kind, for the express purpose of answering all those threads of "what the fuck happened in eva jesus christ"? No big theories or anything, just a good general idea, brief, worded well and written by someone who preferably has more...credentials than I do. Just for general community use, to save us the trouble of typing up a big page to explain Evangelion every time someone asks.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Wed Sep 19, 2007 10:19 pm where do people ask that?

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Wed Sep 19, 2007 10:21 pm Every single anime related board that is not this one. When Eva is brought up. That i've seen anyway. Tell me to link them to the Wiki article, and i'll eat your face.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Wed Sep 19, 2007 10:25 pm if i bothered on other anime boards, i would definitely post the wiki article every time. And then I would feel superior. Of course, if I actually did that, it would make me pathetic for feeling elitist over NGE. Which brings up a totally unrelated point of why we haven't taken over the NGE wiki page.

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Wed Sep 19, 2007 11:47 pm slothen wrote: Which brings up a totally unrelated point of why we haven't taken over the NGE wiki page.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Sep 20, 2007 8:35 am There is an Eva only wiki already in the works, the wheels are turning, there's quite a bit of data on there already as well as a lot of theory and analysis to hopefully sum up discussion over the ages both here and at ANF.

[]:             Quote Post by Tokpile Quohog » Thu Sep 20, 2007 1:18 pm Link them to wiki.......

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Sep 20, 2007 1:26 pm Just link them to this once it's finished (still in the works, we need MOAR geek-slaves!): http://evacommentary.org/evawiki/Main_Page And if you join us, there will be punch and pie.

[]:             Quote Post by CitizenGeek » Thu Sep 20, 2007 4:00 pm I think preparing some kind of FAQ to answer many of the most difficult questions in Evangelion (that is, the ones that have actual, real answers - answering with a theory shouldn't be allowed). It would work well as a group project, I think! For questions that don't have an actual answer, a link to threads that contain theories on the answers should be provided. I think such an 'FAQ' would be awesome!

[]: Re: A request             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Sep 20, 2007 4:53 pm Trigger's Elysium wrote: This seems the best place to put this. Could someone create a copypasta of some kind, for the express purpose of answering all those threads of "what the fuck happened in eva jesus christ"? No big theories or anything, just a good general idea, brief, worded well and written by someone who preferably has more...credentials than I do. Just for general community use, to save us the trouble of typing up a big page to explain Evangelion every time someone asks.

[]: Re: A request             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Thu Sep 20, 2007 5:28 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: You're trying to put a square peg into a round whole. Even if you had someone who could explain Evangelion effectively enough to satisfy someone who had just watched Evangelion, it would be so overly lengthy that no forum n00b would be likely to read it trying to find the answer to just what they want to know.
